seo.title: Ergo Blockchain Infographics — Visual Guides to PoW, DeFi, Storage Rent & Privacy
seo.description: Discover visual explainers of Ergo: PoW consensus, eUTXO smart contracts, storage rent, Sigma privacy, NiPoPoWs and more. Save, share, and reuse with attribution.
seo.keywords: Ergo infographics, blockchain visual guides, Ergo PoW explained, eUTXO diagrams, storage rent visualization, Sigma protocols infographic, NiPoPoWs explained, Ergo vs VC chains, Autolykos mining, ErgoScript tutorial, oracle pools diagram, blockchain education, visual learning, Ergo ecosystem

hero.title: Ergo Blockchain
hero.subtitle: Visual guides to Ergo's PoW, eUTXO smart contracts, storage rent, privacy and global settlement.
hero.subtitleSecondLine: Save, share, and reuse them with attribution to ergoblockchain.org.
hero.description: This hub collects visual explainers for the most important parts of the Ergo protocol: consensus, tokenomics, DeFi, privacy, light clients and more. Every infographic comes with a full-text breakdown so you can learn, teach and build with Ergo.
